query: INSERT INTO user_homes (user_key, current_home_key, current_home_domain, current_move_hash, current_created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT(user_key) DO UPDATE SET current_home_key = excluded.current_home_key, current_home_domain = excluded.current_home_domain, current_move_hash = excluded.current_move_hash, current_created_at = excluded.current_created_at, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', 'now')
